//: design-sync converter ONLY. Maps the app's @hudsonkit/* vite aliases to hudsonkit's real dist files so esbuild (which doesn't read vite.config) can resolve them — for JS imports and app.css's `@import "@hudsonkit/styles"`. Deliberately omits the react/react-dom paths the app tsconfig carries (those point at @types .d.ts and would hijack esbuild's react→window.React shim).
